header.tagline: An atelier of focus on the north light, a bright social forge on the south.
header.industry_note: Tech-startup fintech — warm minimal palette, oak + linen + black steel, Lumen-yellow accent, flex 0.75 with generous collab and a single café-townhall social heart.

atmosphere.hero_image_theme: atelier-bibliothèque office with continuous north-facing oak workbenches, black steel partitions, linen acoustic panels, and a generous south-facing café with daylight and planted anchors

materials.name: Wood-wool acoustic tile
materials.application: Spine wall between collab and focus zones

materials.name: Deep-pigment paint — atelier ink
materials.application: Black steel-look partitions, door frames, signage rail
materials.sustainability: Low-VOC eggshell, durable for office wear

materials.name: Double-glazed acoustic partition
materials.product_ref: Living Walls Momentum — black slim frame

materials.name: Upholstery — Lumen yellow accent
materials.application: Alcove banquettes and café booths — brand expression

furniture.application: Café transition islands + lounge tampon south
Central lounge bande + huddle cluster edges
Town hall stackable seating (120 pax theatre)

planting.strategy: Moderate tier (3–5 %) concentrated on the south café-townhall (direct sun anchors) and the east-west spine at y ≈ 11 500–12 500 as a filter between collab and focus. Workbenches kept deliberately sober — atelier discipline.

light.strategy: 3000 K warm in café + lounge, 3500 K in meeting rooms and collab spine, 4000 K CRI ≥ 90 at north workbenches (EN 12464-1 @ 500 lux, screen-friendly). One statement pendant line over the town hall doubles as event light.

fixtures.application: Linear run over the café bar and the town hall cloison mobile
Individual task light at every workbench + focus rooms
Central stair void — biophilic cluster seen from both floors

notes: Industry bias applied: tech_startup → warm minimal, oak + linen + black steel, Lumen-yellow as single brand accent.
Atelier parti enforced: planting kept off the workbenches, concentrated on café + central spine per design://biophilic-office §1.2.
All meeting-room glazing specified at 44 dB Rw to meet DnT,A ≥ 40 dB target stated in the variant narrative.
[TO VERIFY] exact Kvadrat Steelcut Trio 3 colour reference against Lumen brand deck before ordering.
